text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
El Condor Pasa didn't show up for training, so I
decide to go looking for her.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text:
Damn, we lost again! It's no fair to recruit El for
help!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Aerial attacks are a condor's specialty!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Just keep giving me the ball and I'll keep droppin'
'em in!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Uh, El... I think your trainer is here...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
Qué? What's up, Trainer? You need help with
somethin'?

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: Ah, that's right! I totally spaced!

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text:
I was only gonna play for a little bit, but my
competitive spirit got the best of me...

text_block_list.name: El Condor Pasa
text_block_list.text: I'll be careful next time. I'm really sorry...
